agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Enhancing aromatic complementarity at position 5 with SSTR2-specific ECL2/TM5 re

report.hypothesis: Enhancing aromatic complementarity at position 5 with SSTR2-specific ECL2/TM5 residues will increase selectivity margin by stabilizing SSTR2-specific interactions while disrupting off-target (SSTR3/5) contacts. Introducing a charged residue at position 6 will further differentiate SSTR2 from off-targets by modulating electrostatic interactions.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current design strategy is not sufficiently disrupting conserved interaction

report.hypothesis: The current design strategy is not sufficiently disrupting conserved interactions with SSTR3/SSTR5. A more aggressive focus on non-pharmacophore positions is needed to improve selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: To disrupt conserved pocket contacts with SSTR3/SSTR5 at non-pharmacophore positions and improve selectivity.
These mutations are expected to break conserved interactions with SSTR3/SSTR5 while preserving the FWKT(7-10) motif and Cys3/Cys14.
